perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts in a large warehouse setting with high shelves. A woman in a black dress stands in front of a shelf pointing at a blue pet bed with a canopy. (2) The camera moves closer to show a price tag on the shelf, then transitions to a close-up of the woman touching and pressing on the blue mesh material of the pet bed. (3) A blue crocodile plush toy is placed on the bed, and the woman interacts with it, eventually hugging the toy while looking towards the camera. (4) The camera shows various angles of the pet bed structure and its material before finishing with a shot of the woman holding the plush toy.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic background music starts immediately with a playful and energetic tempo. A young female voice is heard speaking enthusiastically. (2) A male voice responds off-camera, engaging in a dialogue with the female. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) The conversation continues with both voices sounding excited and humorous. Occasional rustling sounds of fabric and the warehouse's ambient low hum are audible beneath the voices and music. (4) The audio concludes with a final humorous exchange between the two speakers as the music fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '寵物露營棚 夏日潮狗必備' (Pet camping tent, summer trendy dog essential) - Descriptive title. (2) Decorative Text: '這什麼' (What is this?) - Hook text appearing in a speech bubble. (3) Functional Text: '寵物架高涼床 附篷架' (Pet elevated cooling bed with canopy) - Product description. (4) Decorative Text: '折199' (Discounted by 199) - Emphasis on price reduction. (5) Decorative Text: '不買血虧' (A huge loss if you don't buy) - High-energy hook to encourage purchase.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to product -> Close-up inspection of features and price -> Hands-on interaction and demonstration -> Closing humor

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character fully visible; 1 male's hand appears briefly and his voice is constant off-screen
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a black tiered dress and grey flats.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with high industrial shelving, numerous boxes of 'Kirkland Signature' products, and price tags.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Price Reveal -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lifestyle shopping recommendation aimed at pet owners. It highlights a specific 'hidden gem' or discount deal at Costco (a pet canopy bed) and uses a conversational, vlog-style approach to demonstrate the product's quality and value to the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically highlights the price tag, brand location (Costco), and urges viewers to buy it before it's gone.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and a duo-interaction format between the camera person and the host.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'treasure hunt' aspect of Costco shopping to create engagement through perceived scarcity (last one left) and high value (discounted price).
